proposed_fix: payload = await self.checkpoint.restore(...)`. But ICheckpointSync.restore() return type is `-> bytes` (ICheckpointSync.py:36). A bytes object cannot be unpacked as a 2-tuple — TypeError at runtime on any restore_checkpoint call.

description: DispatchContext is declared @dataclass(frozen=True) (line 30) but handle_failure() mutates it via `ctx.retry_count += 1` (line 115). Raises dataclasses.FrozenInstanceError on first failover. Entire failover mechanism is broken.
proposed_fix: Option A: Remove frozen=True from DispatchContext. Option B: Create new DispatchContext with updated retry_count instead of mutating.

description: Two non-existent references: (1) line 176 calls `self._checkpoint_sync.persist(...)` — ICheckpointSync has no persist() method. (2) lines 176 and 195 reference `coordinator.state` — SessionCoordinator has no state property. Both raise AttributeError at runtime.
proposed_fix: Add `state: SessionStatus` property to SessionCoordinator. Either add persist() to ICheckpointSync or replace call with checkpoint.mark(). For list_sessions()

description: Constructor calls `tempfile.gettempdir()` (line 13) but tempfile is not imported. Imports are: asyncio uuid time json os. Missing import raises NameError on CLISessionAdapter construction.
Both adapters accept `checkpoint_id` parameter but ignore it — they call get_latest() instead of reading the specific checkpoint. Historical checkpoint restore is impossible; always returns latest.
proposed_fix: Fix restore() in both adapters to read the checkpoint matching the given checkpoint_id. CLI: read specific file. Network: read specific key from store.

description: coordinator.py:101 catches FileNotFoundError. But ICheckpointSync.get_latest() docstring (ICheckpointSync.py:31) mentions SessionCheckpointNotFoundError — an exception class that is never defined anywhere in the codebase. Contract mismatch; non-existent exception referenced.
proposed_fix: Define class SessionCheckpointNotFoundError(Exception): ... in ICheckpointSync.py. Update coordinator catch to use it. Update adapters to raise it.
